name: The Ethereal Caravan
description: The road ahead shimmer as if with heat, but the air is cold. A line of translucent wagons and figures slowly plods across the highway, heading toward the horizon.

caravan-initial.text: The figures are dressed in ancient silks. They don't seem to see you. As they pass, you feel a pull on your very soul.

choices.label: [Resolve 16] Try to touch one of the wagons.
[Intelligence 15] Study the caravan's path and symbols.
Sprinkle Holy Water on the path.
Stand back and let them pass.

touch-wagon-check.success_text: You reach out and your hand makes contact with solid, cold wood. For a moment, you see through the eyes of the ancient travelers.
touch-wagon-check.failure_text: Your hand passes through the wagon as if it were smoke. A freezing chill numbs your arm and rattles your mind.

vision-reward.text: You gain a glimpse of a forgotten trade route. Your map fills with new details.

vision-fail.text: The chill is bone-deep. (Took 6 Cold Damage and 4 Psychic Damage)

study-symbols-check.success_text: You recognize the markings of a long-dead kingdom's royal treasury. You notice one of the spectral guards has dropped a physical item.
study-symbols-check.failure_text: The symbols are too faded and alien to comprehend.

find-token.text: On the ground lies a heavy gold coin, warm to the touch and very real.

holy-water-blessing.text: The holy water sparkles in the air. The spectral travelers pause and bow their heads. The lead figure hands you a translucent gem that slowly turns solid in your hand.

exit.text: The caravan fades into the distance, leaving only a lingering scent of lavender and ozone.
